mapper.select: SELECT * FROM LANDMARK WHERE TITLE LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' AND (#{region} = '' OR ADDR1 LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%') and content_type_id not in ('15','25','28') ORDER BY CONTENT_ID OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH FIRST #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LANDMARK WHERE TITLE LIKE '%' || #{q} || '%' AND (#{region} = '' OR ADDR1 LIKE '%' || #{region} || '%') and content_type_id not in ('15','25','28')
select count(*) from nice where member_no = #{memberNo} and post_no = #{lNumber} and post_board_fx = 'LJ'
mapper.delete: delete from nice where member_no = #{memberNo} and post_no = #{lNumber} and post_board_fx = 'LJ'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NICE WHERE MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND POST_BOARD_FX = 'LJ'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT l.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY n.NICE_NO DESC) AS rnum FROM landmark l JOIN NICE n ON (l.content_id = n.POST_NO) WHERE n.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND n.POST_BOARD_FX = 'LJ' ) WHERE rnum BETWEEN #{startRow} + 1 AND #{startRow} + #{listLimit}
